description: Heal for a percentage of damage dealt on every attack.
tooltipTemplate: Heal for {lifestealPercent%} of damage dealt on each hit.

description: Deal bonus damage to enemies below a low-HP threshold.
tooltipTemplate: Deal +{bonusMultiplier%} damage to enemies below {hpThresholdPercent%} HP.

description: Gain a short burst of movement speed after attacking.
tooltipTemplate: Each attack grants +{moveSpeedBonus%} move speed for {durationSeconds:1}s.
